target: OBE dismissals: 13 orphan minor/moderate ISSs confirmed already resolved by prior EXPs

ISS requested source for '88% peak obscuration at Hartland'. Current §4.2.7 prose (line 3089) reads: 'peaks at ≈ 88 % obscuration (NASA SE2026Aug12T Besselian elements, Fred Espenak / NASA GSFC, for Hartland 51.0° N, 4.48° W; per-station local circumstances at eclipse.gsfc.nasa.gov)'. Citation is present. OBE.

EXP-271 remediated all falsifiability-module CSS classes to use ds- prefix. Current HTML verified: class='ds-falsifiability-module', ds-fm-heading, ds-fm-caption, ds-fm-jump, ds-fm-row, ds-fm-condition, ds-fm-desc, ds-fm-status, ds-fm-status-num, ds-fm-status-sub — all prefixed. test.js EXP-271 block asserts unprefixed 'falsifiability-module' class is absent. OBE.

ISS reported 5 test additions from EXP-256 missing from test.js. EXP-271 subsequently added 15+ test.js assertions covering ds-falsifiability-module presence, unprefixed-class absence, 4 row count, all 4 condition titles, fm-jump href, status-num framing, WCAG font-size, sub-status color, and visual order. ISS need fully met. OBE.

ISS reported thesis-hero placed after falsifiability-module in the HTML. Verified: ds-thesis-hero appears at line 348, ds-verdict-bars at line 380, ds-falsifiability-module at line 430 — correct order (hero before bars before module). test.js EXP-271 block at line 739-747 asserts this order. OBE.

ISS reported model’s curly entity in evaluate-preface while eg-evaluate uses ASCII apostrophe. Verified lines 455-615 of docs/index.html: no ’ entity appears in this range. The Five Questions list (line 469) uses 'model's' (ASCII). No inconsistency present in current HTML. OBE.

ISS noted '39 domain count is volatile' and suggested optional footnote. (a) This is explicitly marked optional in the ISS. (b) The '39' in §2b.5/§4.1 refers to monitor.py's domain array size at a specific commit, not a live count — context makes this clear. (c) Adding a footnote to every volatile count would add noise without proportionate benefit. No patch warranted. OBE as non-critical optional improvement.

ISS reported 'Domain 11 (archived 2026-04-07)' label still cited in SEC-4.2.2 text after V51.x reorganization. grep 'Domain 11' in docs/index.html returns zero results. The label was removed in a prior EXP. OBE.
ISS reported ±3 nT rule attribution still pointing to Domain 11 archival label. Same as ISS-1703 — 'Domain 11' not present anywhere in docs/index.html. Attribution already updated. OBE.
